taxonomy: Chrysiphiala viridiflora is classified as a genus within the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the buttercup family. This plant is native to Australia and belongs to the order Ranunculales. The classification of Chrysiphiala viridiflora is further refined within the kingdom Plantae. The species is also known to be a part of the class Magnoliopsida. Further classification details include it being a member of the clade Angiosperms.
